typography.instructions: Use Manrope for all Headings. Use Inter for body text. Use JetBrains Mono specifically for Trend Scores, View Counts, and Analytics data points.

colors.rules: Background must be #0A0A0A (Obsidian), never pure black. Use the 'hero_glow' behind the main search input. Use 'accent_teal' for high-velocity trend scores.

layout.spacing_system: Generous. Use p-8 or p-12 for section padding. Gap-6 or Gap-8 for grids.
layout.grid_strategy: Bento Grid for Results. Top result spans 2 columns (if desktop).

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,255,255,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-2 backdrop-blur-sm transition-all

cards.style: Glassmorphism. bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300 group

inputs.search_bar: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 focus:border-purple-500/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-purple-500/50 rounded-xl px-6 py-4 text-lg w-full transition-all placeholder:text-white/20

modals.content: bg-[#0F0F0F] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 max-w-3xl w-full fixed left-1/2 top-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 z-50 shadow-2xl

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl for panels floating over complex backgrounds.
visual_enhancers.noise: Add a subtle noise texture overlay at 3% opacity to the entire body to kill digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.glows: Use colored blurs behind key elements (like the Trend Score) to make them 'radiate'.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders with 10% opacity white. Do not use thick borders.

motion.micro_interactions: Active elements should scale down slightly (0.98) on click.

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use 'TrendingUp', 'Zap', 'Play', 'X', 'Info', 'BarChart3'.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Ensure 'lucide-react' and 'framer-motion' (if available) or standard CSS animations are ready.
2. THEME: Force DARK MODE. Do not implement a light mode toggle. The app is strictly dark.
3. LAYOUT: The Home page is NOT a dashboard. It is a 'Search Engine' style interface. Center the input. Show results below only AFTER search.
4. RESULTS: The 'Top 5' must use a Bento Grid. Video #1 is the 'Hero' (large). Videos #2-5 are smaller cards.
5. ANALYSIS: The 'Why it works' modal is the core value. Make it look like a 'Declassified Document' or 'Code Breakdown'. Use monospaced fonts for the analysis text.
6. SCORE: The 'Trend Velocity Score' must be prominent. Use a color scale: <50 (Gray), 50-80 (Blue), >80 (Neon Teal/Pink).
7. NOISE: Add a fixed position div with a noise background image (base64 or url) and pointer-events-none to create the film grain effect.
8. DATA-TESTID: Add 'data-testid' to the Niche Selector, Fetch Button, Video Cards, and Modal Close button.
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic gradients. Use dark, rich backgrounds.
Do not center align the entire app. Use left alignment for content reading.
Interactive elements must have hover states (text color change or background shift).
